subcodes.first_line: O my God! Sanctify the hearts of Thy loved ones from occupation with aught else save Thee, and purify the souls of Thy chosen ones from all concerns [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی قدس قلوب احبتک عن الاشتغال بغیرک و طهر نفوس اصفیائک عن الشئون
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
